basic_details.job_title: IIT Gandhinagar Project Associate I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Gandhinagar (IIT Gandhinagar) Project Associate I Recruitment 2026 Notification has been released on the official website of IIT Gandhinagar. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the IIT Gandhinagar Project Associate I Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.age_details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Tech./B.E./M.Sc. or equivalent in any discipline, B.Sc. or equivalent qualification in an appropriate discipline with a minimum of 04 years of post-qualification experience, Minimum 60% or equivalent grade in percentage/grade points from Graduation onwards and 55% or equivalent grade in class 10th and 12th
qualification.details: Project Associate I: Essential: B.Tech./B.E./M.Sc. or equivalent in any discipline OR B.Sc. or equivalent qualification in an appropriate discipline with a minimum of 04 years of post-qualification experience. Candidates should have a minimum 60% or equivalent grade in percentage/grade points from Graduation onwards and 55% or equivalent grade in class 10th and 12th. Desirable: Strong conceptual understanding of Biology concepts of grades 6-12, hands-on experience in Biology laboratory techniques, proficiency in formal/educational writing, workshop facilitation, fluency in English and Hindi, experience in curriculum development preferred.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 13-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Gandhinagar to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Gandhinagar Project Associate I recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the IIT Gandhinagar Project Associate I recruitment is 13th May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Project Associate I post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies available for the Project Associate I post at IIT Gandhinagar.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Associate I position?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have a B.Tech./B.E./M.Sc. or equivalent in any discipline, or a B.Sc. with 4 years of post-qualification experience, along with specific percentage criteria in 10th, 12th, and graduation.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate I role?
faq.answer: The salary for the Project Associate I position ranges from Rs. 45,000/- to Rs. 70,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is strictly online through the official IIT Gandhinagar website.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for General/OBC candidates?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for General/OBC candidates in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' link.

faq.question: Q8. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is OTH/13470/Advt0166.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for the Project Associate I position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Project Associate I position is contract-based.

faq.question: Q10. What are the desirable qualifications for the Project Associate I role?
faq.answer: Desirable qualifications include strong biology concepts understanding, lab experience, writing proficiency, workshop facilitation skills, and curriculum development experience.
